prompt_text:
### Demographics: 71-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 20 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Fibrosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Major Depressive Disorder
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Fibrosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 78.5 kg; Height 159.4 cm; BMI 30.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 128/77 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.7%; 9 months ago 8.1%; 6 months ago 7.6%; 3 months ago 7.7%; current 5.8%), FPG (12 months ago 183mg/dL; 9 months ago 190mg/dL; 6 months ago 160mg/dL; 3 months ago 197mg/dL; current 108mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 77.2kg; 9 months ago 74.9kg; 6 months ago 73.7kg; 3 months ago 74.2kg; current 78.5kg), Height (12 months ago 159.4cm; 9 months ago 159.4cm; 6 months ago 159.4cm; 3 months ago 159.4cm; current 159.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 29.0kg/m²; current 30.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 126mmHg; 9 months ago 131mmHg; 6 months ago 129mmHg; 3 months ago 130mmHg; current 128mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 80mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 81mmHg; current 77mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 58U/L; 9 months ago 56U/L; 6 months ago 59U/L; 3 months ago 55U/L; current 60U/L), AST (12 months ago 100U/L; 9 months ago 101U/L; 6 months ago 97U/L; 3 months ago 90U/L; current 98U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.6mg/dL; current 1.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 31mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 30mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; current 27mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 723mg/g; 9 months ago 601mg/g; 6 months ago 944mg/g; 3 months ago 987mg/g; current 692mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 68mg/dL; 9 months ago 75mg/dL; 6 months ago 68mg/dL; 3 months ago 70mg/dL; current 72mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 50mg/dL; 9 months ago 51mg/dL; 6 months ago 50mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 52mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 131mg/dL; 9 months ago 112mg/dL; 6 months ago 133mg/dL; 3 months ago 116mg/dL; current 123mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.7g/dL; 9 months ago 11.7g/dL; 6 months ago 12.3g/dL; 3 months ago 12.4g/dL; current 12.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
